ops.title: Update cc-skills fleet prose with durable-records guidance
ops.description: Add a `## Durable Records (cc-notes)` section (user-approved text) to cc-skills `plugin/guides/md/claude-rules.md` — the one fragment every fleet consumer's CLAUDE.md imports — then trigger the fleet re-render dispatch so all ~41 consumers (incl. write-like-me) pick it up with zero per-repo layout edits.

ops.text: claude-rules.md on cc-skills main carries the Durable Records (cc-notes) section and guides-lint CI is green
write-like-me's CLAUDE.md on GitHub contains the section after the fleet re-render dispatch
